headline: Nvidia Just Posted Its Longest Winning Streak Since 2023. Is This Time for Real?
summary: The S&P 500 is mixed after March inflation came in just below forecasts and uncertainty over a peaceful resolution to the Iran war. Tech stocks, though, were once again doing the heavy lifting. Right in the middle is Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA), which just logged its eighth consecutive session of gains through Friday’s close, with the stock ... Nvidia Just Posted Its Longest Winning Streak Since 2023. Is This Time for Real?
